# Golden Principles (Minimal)

1. Repo = system of record
2. Map, not manual (pointers, not dumps)
3. Enforce invariants, not implementations
4. Parse at boundaries
5. AVM-first, security baseline always
6. Golden path (shared skills over hand-rolled)
7. Encode human taste into rules
8. Context is scarce
9. Progressive disclosure
10. Mechanical enforcement over docs

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for definitions and tests.
